non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Caller will be contacted the next business day

after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, emergency calls from G&M Pressure Washing are patched through to Ben; all other callers receive a message and will be contacted the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours (Mon‑Fri 8:30 AM‑5:00 PM), Clara answers calls, mentions the $115 service call fee only if asked, and can forward calls to the second number once it is set up or transfer to Ben on request.
questions_or_unknowns: Phone numbers for routing and second line
notes: Client is currently a sole proprietorship planning to incorporate later in the year. Interested in using Clara for collections, dispatcher‑based job assignment, appointment confirmations, review collection, and leveraging a club membership program for priority scheduling and discounts.
